pages.text: When the Unwitnessed Amulet is witnessed, it reveals one of seven colored Enigmatic Amulets.$(br2)Each color represents a different kind of power.
pages.title: Seven Enigmatic Amulets

pages.text: The seven forms are:$(br2)$(li)Red: Attack Damage$(br)$(li)Aqua: Sprint Speed$(br)$(li)Violet: Projectile Deflection$(br)$(li)Magenta: Gravity Change$(br)$(li)Green: Mining Efficiency$(br)$(li)Black: Lifesteal$(br)$(li)Blue: Swim Speed
pages.title: Seven Forms

pages.text: All seven colored amulets can be gathered into the Amulet of Ascension.$(br2)The Amulet of Ascension inherits all seven powers and leads toward the more dangerous Testament of Contempt.
pages.title: Progression
